description: tRPC builder `.query((opts) => { ... })` — non-async arrow handler with template-literal log message inside. Same handler-shape FP class as openstatus, just without `async` keyword. F1.1 detects via paren-arrow recognition (no `=>` follows balanced-close of `(opts)` → continue scanning, but the FIRST char after `.query(` is `(` so the arrow-detection branch fires).
